issues.title: Adjust the VertexAiGeminiChatModel to make use of the new system-instructions support.
issues.body:
Google Vertex AI Gemini API `26.41`  BOM release had introduced `system-instructions` support:
- https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/generative-ai/docs/learn/prompts/system-instructions
- https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/generative-ai/docs/learn/prompts/system-instructions#gemini-system-instructions-code-samples-java

As until now Gemini lacked system messages support, Spring AI use to convert those messages into to-level User messages. Now we can retire this code if favour of using the new `GenerativeModel#systemInstructions` API
